text:
IMPARTIAL NEWS + INTELLIGENT DEBATE

Account

The closing ceremony will be sci-fi themed and explore a dystopian Olympics, with speculation of performances from Tom Cruise, Snoop Dogg, and Billie Eilish and Charli XCX.

After two weeks of sport, record-breaking andgold medalmoments, theParis Olympicswill come to a close this Sunday.

The closing ceremony will take place at the Stade de France, which has hosted athletics and rugby sevens duringthe Games. It is scheduled to start at 8.00pm and finish at 10.30 pm British time.

The last event will be the Women’s Basketball game on Sunday morning at 9.30 am, then there will be the parade of athletes, thanking of the 45,000 volunteers, and the medal ceremony for the women’s marathon.

Spectators will also see the extinguishing of the Olympic flame, which will be brought from Tuileries, where the cauldron has been on display and visited by tens of thousands of fans.

Next will be the proclamation of the end of the Olympic Games, made by the President of the International Olympic Committee, Thomas Bach.

Lastly, ahead of the 2028 Los Angeles games, the Olympic flag will be handed over from Anne Hidalgo to Karen Bass, the mayor of the next host city, Los Angeles.

The ceremony will be live onBBC One, BBC iPlayer and the BBC Sport website and app. Television coverage begins at 7.00 pm and there will be an accompanying live text Sunday.

Billie Eilish has been confirmed to be performing at the ceremony and Charli XCX also seemed to suggest that she would be there, meaning we could possibly see the pair perform their Spotify number one hit “Guess”.

There are also rumours that Tom Cruise will feature in an abseiling stunt down the stadium itself. The Hollywood star’s participation could suggest conjunction with the next Olympics’ proximity to Hollywood.

The closing ceremony will feature the usual plethora of dance, with some added circus acts, and rapper Snoop Dogg, a prominent figure at the games, also expected to perform.

Artistic director Thomas Jolly said the show was called “Records'” and will be based on the science-fiction genre. The story will begin at the origins of the Olympic Games and move to a dystopian future.

Impartial news + intelligent debate

title: Paris Olympics closing ceremony: Date, time, how to watch and what we know so far
author: Emilia Randall
description: The closing ceremony will be sci-fi themed and explore a dystopian Olympics, with speculation of performances from Tom Cruise, Snoop Dogg, and Billie Eilish and Charli XCX.
